name: cambodia-radar-desktop-viewer
description: A minimal Linux desktop viewer for Cambodia Meteo radar animations.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && RADAR_DEV_SERVER=http://localhost:5173 env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.start: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .
scripts.start:calibrate: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron . --calibrate
